title: Tactical Dog Collar - Dog Collar Medium - Heavy Duty Large Dog Collar with Handle, Adjustable Nylon K9 Quick Release Metal Buckle - Soft Padded for Comfort - Strong Training Collar (M/L/XL)
features: 🛡 DURABLE & COMFORTABLE – Made from high-quality nylon with soft padded lining to prevent chafing. Strong, wear-resistant, and comfortable for your dog’s daily adventures.
🔒 HEAVY-DUTY BUCKLE – Quick-release metal Cobra buckle ensures security and easy use. Designed to withstand pulling, keeping your dog safely secured.
✋ BUILT-IN HANDLE – The reinforced handle gives you direct control for training, walking, or emergency situations. Perfect for handling strong and active dogs.

📏 ADJUSTABLE FIT – Available in M, L, and XL, with a strong Velcro strap for easy adjustments. Ideal for growing dogs and ensuring a snug, comfortable fit. Perfect as Dog Collar Medium and Dog Collar Large
🌲 VERSATILE & RELIABLE – Designed for training, hiking, patrolling, or daily walks. Suitable for large breeds like German Shepherds, Rottweilers, and Labradors.
description: Product description Tactical Dog Collar with Handle, Heavy Duty Military Dog Collar with D Ring, Adjustable Tactical Collars for Medium to Large Dogs Training, Available in 3 sizes and 3 colors high quality metal buckle tactical collar. Dog Collar Medium and Dog Collar Large High quality adjustable metal buckle tactical dog collar, available in 3 sizes (M, L XL) and 3 colors (Green, Blue, Black) – Made from high-quality nylon with soft padded lining to prevent chafing.
